inputs.label: Expansion Point (a)
inputs.businessContext: The point about which the Taylor series is expanded.

inputs.label: Evaluation Point (x)
inputs.businessContext: The point at which the function is approximated.

inputs.label: Polynomial Degree
inputs.businessContext: Highest order of the Taylor polynomial (0–3).

inputs.label: f(a)
inputs.businessContext: Function value at the expansion point.

inputs.label: f'(a)
inputs.businessContext: First derivative at the expansion point.

inputs.label: f''(a)
inputs.businessContext: Second derivative at the expansion point.

inputs.label: f'''(a)
inputs.businessContext: Third derivative at the expansion point.

formulas.primary: f0 + (degree >= 1 ? f1 * (evaluationPoint - expansionPoint) : 0) + (degree >= 2 ? (f2 / 2) * Math.pow(evaluationPoint - expansionPoint, 2) : 0) + (degree >= 3 ? (f3 / 6) * Math.pow(evaluationPoint - expansionPoint, 3) : 0)
